decisions.decision: DSAR worker step 6 uses HTTP REST (not @replit/object-storage SDK)
decisions.rationale: SDK not installed in worker; HTTP matches pattern already used in hermes/src/lib/object-storage.ts

decisions.decision: Hermes /dsar and /review_masks use getCreatorPreferences for locale resolution
decisions.rationale: Consistent with other commands; founders who aren't linked creators fall back to 'en'
